news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp approves allotment of 67.43M shares at ₹370.75, raising ₹25,000M.
Shares allotted at a 5% discount to ₹390.26 floor price; paid-up capital now 1,760M shares.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp approves allotment of 67.43M shares at ₹370.75, raising ₹25,000M.
Shares allotted at a 5% discount to ₹390.26 floor price; paid-up capital now 1,760M shares.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp plans a QIP to raise ₹5,000 crore, board approved ₹5,500 crore fundraise.
Approval was announced on Jan 16 alongside Q3 results; management response awaited.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp plans a QIP to raise ₹5,000 crore, board approved ₹5,500 crore fundraise.
Approval was announced on Jan 16 alongside Q3 results; management response awaited.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp's AUM reached approx. ₹60,325 Cr as of 31st March 2026.
The company holds ample liquidity of ₹7,550 Cr, focusing on sustainable growth.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp's AUM reached approx. ₹60,325 Cr as of 31st March 2026.
The company holds ample liquidity of ₹7,550 Cr, focusing on sustainable growth.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed 'CARE AAA' and 'CARE A1' ratings for Poonawalla Fincorp's instruments, reflecting stability and strong financial backing.
The company's AUM grew to ₹55,017 Cr by Dec 2025, showcasing strong capitalization and diversified product strategy.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed 'CARE AAA' and 'CARE A1' ratings for Poonawalla Fincorp's instruments, reflecting stability and strong financial backing.
The company's AUM grew to ₹55,017 Cr by Dec 2025, showcasing strong capitalization and diversified product strategy.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp repaid its CP maturity amount on March 13, 2026.
The repayment aligns with SEBI guidelines; ISIN INE511C14ZD8 was timely cleared.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp repaid its CP maturity amount on March 13, 2026.
The repayment aligns with SEBI guidelines; ISIN INE511C14ZD8 was timely cleared.

news.title:
UBS initiates 'Buy' on Poonawalla Fincorp with a target of ₹640, implying a 38.9% upside.
RoA expected to reach 2% by FY28, supported by healthier margins, lower costs, and key products.
news.summary:
UBS initiates 'Buy' on Poonawalla Fincorp with a target of ₹640, implying a 38.9% upside.
RoA expected to reach 2% by FY28, supported by healthier margins, lower costs, and key products.

news.title:
Q3FY26 shows strong NBFC growth with improved portfolio quality.
Lower bond yields reduce financing costs, driving margin expansion for NBFCs.
news.summary:
Q3FY26 shows strong NBFC growth with improved portfolio quality.
Lower bond yields reduce financing costs, driving margin expansion for NBFCs.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp allotted 1,00,000 NCDs worth ₹1,000 crore with 7.9% annual coupon rate.
The debentures have a maturity date set for June 12, 2028.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp allotted 1,00,000 NCDs worth ₹1,000 crore with 7.9% annual coupon rate.
The debentures have a maturity date set for June 12, 2028.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp to raise ₹1,000 crore via secured NCDs, listed on BSE.
AUM grew 77.5% YoY to ₹55,000 crore; shares up 63.9% in past year.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp to raise ₹1,000 crore via secured NCDs, listed on BSE.
AUM grew 77.5% YoY to ₹55,000 crore; shares up 63.9% in past year.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp approves ₹1000 Cr non-convertible debentures for private issuance.
The debentures will be listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE).
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp approves ₹1000 Cr non-convertible debentures for private issuance.
The debentures will be listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE).

news.title: Poonawalla Fincorp approved issuance of NCDs worth ₹10 billion.
news.summary: Poonawalla Fincorp approved issuance of NCDs worth ₹10 billion.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd surged 5.58% intraday to Rs 489.1 on 10 Feb 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector by 4.7% amid a positive market backdrop.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd surged 5.58% intraday to Rs 489.1 on 10 Feb 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector by 4.7% amid a positive market backdrop.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp gets RBI approval to start factoring business.
Approval dated Jan 30, 2026, enables financial services diversification.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp gets RBI approval to start factoring business.
Approval dated Jan 30, 2026, enables financial services diversification.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp approves issuance of secured NCDs worth ₹500 crore via private placement.
The NCDs will be listed on BSE and secured with pari passu charge on hypothecated properties.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp approves issuance of secured NCDs worth ₹500 crore via private placement.
The NCDs will be listed on BSE and secured with pari passu charge on hypothecated properties.

news.title: Poonawalla Fincorp plans to issue non-convertible debentures worth ₹5 billion.
news.summary: Poonawalla Fincorp plans to issue non-convertible debentures worth ₹5 billion.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp launches 5 AI solutions for competitive intelligence, KYC, data quality, feedback, and app development.
AI improves onboarding by 15%, enhances feedback categorization, and accelerates app development; 30 of 57 projects completed.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp launches 5 AI solutions for competitive intelligence, KYC, data quality, feedback, and app development.
AI improves onboarding by 15%, enhances feedback categorization, and accelerates app development; 30 of 57 projects completed.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp's quality grade upgraded from average to good, prompting a Buy rating by MarketsMojo.
Improvements in ROE, ROCE, and debt management signal enhanced fundamentals in the NBFC sector.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp's quality grade upgraded from average to good, prompting a Buy rating by MarketsMojo.
Improvements in ROE, ROCE, and debt management signal enhanced fundamentals in the NBFC sector.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp's Q3 gross stage 3 assets improved to 1.51% from 1.59% QoQ.
Net stage 3 assets also decreased to 0.80% from 0.81% QoQ.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp's Q3 gross stage 3 assets improved to 1.51% from 1.59% QoQ.
Net stage 3 assets also decreased to 0.80% from 0.81% QoQ.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp Q3FY26 PAT rose 102.5% QoQ to ₹150 Cr; AUM grew 41.5% YoY.
New product disbursement at 20%, with 294 branches; capital adequacy ratio at 18.2%.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp Q3FY26 PAT rose 102.5% QoQ to ₹150 Cr; AUM grew 41.5% YoY.
New product disbursement at 20%, with 294 branches; capital adequacy ratio at 18.2%.

news.title:
Poonawalla Fincorp approved Q3 results, equity issuance of Rs. 5,500 cr.
Company to raise Rs. 20,000 cr via non-convertible debt; new Director appointed.
news.summary:
Poonawalla Fincorp approved Q3 results, equity issuance of Rs. 5,500 cr.
Company to raise Rs. 20,000 cr via non-convertible debt; new Director appointed.
